programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: One of the most famous frontmen in the world, David Lee Roth is unlike most lead singers.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Famous for hits like "I'm Eighteen," Alice Cooper shocked and scandalized his way to stardom.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: As part of Aerosmith, Steve Tyler was one of the most iconic, bombastic, charismatic frontmen.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Gene Simmons and Paul Stanley somehow shared the limelight and made a spectacle like no other.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: With hits like "Livin' On A Prayer," Bon Jovi is equally successful as a solo artist and actor.

programme.title: Get to the Heart: The Barbara Mandrell Story
programme.desc: This compelling portrait of country music star Barbara Mandrell looks at her early career, the car accident in 1984 that almost killed her and her ultimate recovery.

programme.title: High Lonesome - The Story Of Bluegrass Music
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: High Lonesome traces the music and sounds from its Appalachian roots to the present. The rise; fall; and consistent revival of bluegrass chronicled through oral history and visual record.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse: A Final Goodbye (2011)
programme.desc: A Final Goodbye is an intimate look into the life and times of Amy Winehouse. This in-depth program chronicles her rise to pop superstardom and also offers a sensitive portrayal of a transformative star and the inner demons that inspired her work.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints some of Nature's most awesome creations - magnificent snow-covered mountains! Beauty you just have to experience.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross down a little lakeside path in a secluded place; you'll delight in the discovery of a small uninhabited island.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: One of nature's perfect creations -- the misty, splashing waterfall -- is painted by Bob Ross, in all its magnificent splendor.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins makes sure the chill of autumn is felt creeping in on the banks of a winding creek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Joyce Ortner captures the true beauty of the ocean waves, blue and enchanting in this breathtaking seascape masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this painting Bob Ross emphasizes a slow river winding around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Kick-off your shoes and let the fragrant grassy meadow tickle your toes - a fantastic Bob Ross summertime landscape to enjoy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins recalls memories of summers past in this scene originally painted on July 4, 1995.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: What a delicate view of polar beauty; Bob Ross taps his brushes to make subtle hills, sleeping grasses, and leafless trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a little imagination and lots of colors to create this soft, luxurious early autumn lake scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A path of cacti and rocks lead right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky, all from the delicate motions of Bob Ross' paint brush.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross combines the simple elements of a sky, a mountain, and a lake to produce this ultra-soft tribute to nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A happy little winter landscape, inside a happy little oval - with homey barn and lacy bushes -- another real Bob Ross classic.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross in the mountains of the east, and bask in the breathtaking serenity of a waterfall bubbling and splashing, nestled among the evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy a casual stroll down the pathway overlooking a quiet pond and breathe in the cool crisp fall air! Bob Ross takes you through this magnificent season.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a clear windless day, where reflections are so smooth they appear to be crystal likenesses of the mountains above.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Shades of lushious red, lavender and gold surround a bubbling brook flowing through a serene oval painting by television's favorite painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Ice cold pond, snowy-covered banks, soft hues in the sky … Bob Ross teaches us to admire the simple beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Venture into the heart of Americana with Bob Ross and discover the serenity of a snow-covered farmhouse and barn on a cold January day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Layers and layers of mountains, as far as the eye can see -- Bob Ross shows us the secret to creating a larger-than-life landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover what autumn beauty unfolds as those exotic orange and gold colors appear on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breathtaking skies, bending palms, and waves accentuate the cool night breeze. A one-of-a-kind masterpiece by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the mystique of snowflakes gently tumbling in the silence of the forest. Join Bob Ross for this lovely winter masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross and experience the quiet motionless beauty of a glassy river as the morning fog hangs onto the distant shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' striking color contrasts create a scene that appears to thaw under the bright sun of a late winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint little home with Bob Ross and experience the beauty of tender morn in the stillness of the forest; what a delightful painting.

programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The Satellite of Love crew take on a short about grocery store freezers.

programme.title: MST3K: The Land The Time Forgot
programme.desc: A motley group aboard a German U-boat discovers an island full of ancient beasts and evolutionary mysteries in the blustery 1974 adventure.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Touch of Satan
programme.desc: An aimless young man encounters a rural family that seems to have some secrets.

programme.title: MST3K: Ator, The Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: In part six of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1982 film Ator, the Fighting Eagle.

programme.title: MST3K: The Undead
programme.desc: A woman gets hypnotized back into her Dark Age'd past life while Tom takes a crack at being an observer.

programme.title: MST3K: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: In part four of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1979 film The Day Time Ended.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: Carnival Magic
programme.desc: Kinga, drops a bombshell on Jonah before plunging him into a world of bare-chested carnies, talking chimps, brooding magicians and young love.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: The small northwest town of Twin Peaks, Washington is shaken up when the body of the Homecoming Queen, Laura Palmer, is discovered washed up on a riverbank, wrapped in plastic.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Agent Cooper enjoys the comforts of the Great Northern Hotel. Bobby Briggs and Mike Nelson are released from jail. Doctor Hayward hands over the autopsy report on Laura Palmer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A night school class in law draws Lieutenant Steve Sloan into another police investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's not child's play when Amanda Bentley's long-time friend Angela Pearson shows up on her doorstep ready to give birth to quadruplets and then disappears after the children are born.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Amanda wins a contest to appear on her favorite daytime TV drama The Young and The Restless, just about everyone at Community General Hospital tries to wrangle an invitation to join her on the set.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan thought he'd heard it all--until psychiatrist Max Frey consulted him about a patient who claimed she'd been impregnated by an outer space alien.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex gets Walker and Trivette assigned to a movie being filmed as technical advisers. While on the set, Walker overhears several stuntmen talking about a train robbery they are planning.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The homeless are being beaten by a group of teens who film their attack. Walker poses as a homeless man to see if he can catch them in the act.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A group of men kidnap a wealthy businessman and take others who were standing near. Alex is one of the people kidnapped. While the kidnappers are arranging for ransom, Alex manages to call Walker with information to help him find them.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: Semi-Tough
programme.desc: Barbara Jane (Jill Clayburgh), Billy Clyde (Burt Reynolds) and Shake (Kris Kristofferson) have been best friends for years. But when Barbara Jane's new interest in Shake turns into love, Billy Clyde realizes she's the woman he’s wanted all along!

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Monty Python's Life of Brian
programme.desc: A notorious religious satire, the film tells the story of Brian (Graham Chapman), a reluctant would-be messiah who rises to prominence as a result of a series of absurd and truly hilarious circumstances.

programme.title: The Kentucky Fried Movie
programme.desc: Series of short, highly irreverent, and quite often tasteless skits.

programme.title: Up in Smoke

programme.title: Vanilla Sky

programme.title: Zodiac

programme.title: Real Genius

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 1st Edition Apparition

programme.desc: This historic roundhouse and rail yard is connected to more that just old trains. The frightening remnants of a serial killer, horrific accidents and one of the worst train crashes have two people questioning strange encounters.

programme.desc: An armory that's been standing for over 100 years harbors a ghostly mystery. Recent female leadership is coinciding with increased paranormal activity.

programme.desc: A renowned restaurant, The Whitney, once owned by a lumber baron in the 1800's, might still have family members hanging around its halls. Renovations and construction around the property could be behind the uprising of spirits.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Children in the Attic
programme.desc: One of the oldest yacht clubs in the USA is also one of the most haunted! A mother and her son are entangled in phenomena involving a frightening family from the past with a strange story to tell.

programme.desc: Fear is spreading at Fort Taber-Fort Rodmanthat a new \\"living history event\\" has stirred up frightening paranormal activity on the park grounds.

programme.desc: TAPS has been called to investigate a historic armory. An upcoming renovation has those involved fearful the construction might provoke lingering spirits attached to artifacts with documented violent pasts.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Public Poltergeist Number 1
programme.desc: The historic Old Lake County Jail was once considered to be inescapable... until notorious gangster John Dillinger, escaped from it in 1934. Over 80 years later, aggressive prisoners are breaking free as sealed areas.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Angel of Death
programme.desc: Behind the facade of a beautiful old Inn, lies the haunting memories of a home that was once part of the Underground Railroad, and the family that helped slaves to freedom.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Overdue For Death

programme.desc: A 1920's historic theater is rumored to be haunted by one of New London's most prominent whaling families.
